positive: A highly stylized, minimalist vector illustration of a lunar eclipse over stylized mountain peaks. The composition is centered and symmetrical, featuring strong geometric shapes. The color palette is limited to deep midnight blues, muted teal, celestial gold, and stark cream white. The design should evoke a sense of serene cosmic mystery. Incorporate clean line work and a slight halftone dot pattern overlay for texture, giving it a vintage, modern graphic design feel. The overall effect must be suitable for a high-contrast apparel print.
negative: low detail, text, signature, watermark, blurry, cropped, artifact, noise, poor composition, low contrast, bad anatomy, extra limbs
